tasks.objective: Harden SESSION_SECRET/JWT guards with explicit runtime failures and no fallback secret.
acceptance_criteria: No fallback secret remains.
Missing or weak SESSION_SECRET fails explicitly.
Existing valid sessions continue working.

tasks.objective: Tighten middleware public route allowlist and unauthorized behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Only intended public routes are open.
Private APIs return 401 without valid session.
Protected pages redirect to login.

tasks.objective: Secure reset password lifecycle by storing only token hashes and avoiding token leaks.
acceptance_criteria: Reset token is never stored in plain text.
Validation compares hashed token.
No user-facing token leak introduced.

tasks.objective: Consolidate global security headers and CSP compatibility.
acceptance_criteria: CSP works with existing analytics/assets.
No build regression from header policy.
Security headers remain explicit.

tasks.objective: Improve consent utility robustness and null-safety for cookie/session handling.
acceptance_criteria: Cookie parsing is deterministic.
Consent status defaults safely.
Visitor session upsert handles nullable context.

tasks.objective: Strengthen consent API payload validation and logging guarantees.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid payload returns HTTP 400.
Successful consent always writes ConsentLog.
Cookie/state stays synchronized.

tasks.objective: Harden analytics API to stay strictly consent-gated and payload-safe.
acceptance_criteria: No tracking when consent is not granted.
Metadata validation prevents malformed payloads.
Endpoint remains stable under missing optional fields.

tasks.objective: Eliminate consent banner client race conditions across reload/navigation.
acceptance_criteria: Analytics starts only after explicit acceptance.
Reload/navigation keeps consent state correctly.
No render loops or client errors.

tasks.objective: Review Prisma schema relations/indexes for new consent and survey models.
acceptance_criteria: Relations compile with prisma generate.
Indexes match expected query patterns.
Naming remains consistent with existing schema.

tasks.objective: Align migration SQL with the final Prisma schema.
acceptance_criteria: FKs and uniques match schema.
Index definitions align with model indexes.
Migration is idempotent for deployment flow.

tasks.objective: Ensure conference survey seed is idempotent and conflict-safe.
acceptance_criteria: Re-running seed does not duplicate conference surveys.
Question seeding remains deterministic.
No conflict with existing event seed logic.

tasks.objective: Align environment template and API setup doc with orchestrator requirements.
acceptance_criteria: OPENROUTER-related variables are documented clearly.
API setup instructions are executable end-to-end.
No stale references to removed routes or old orchestration flow.

tasks.objective: Stabilize conference surveys read API payload shape and ordering.
acceptance_criteria: Payload shape stays consistent.
hasResponded is accurate per user.
Surveys/questions ordering is deterministic.

tasks.objective: Tighten conference survey submission validation for required fields and type mismatches.
acceptance_criteria: Required questions are enforced.
Type mismatches return explicit 400 errors.
Upsert behavior remains one response per user/survey.

tasks.objective: Improve active wave selection and fallback behavior for discernment current endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: Active wave takes priority when available.
Fallback selects deterministic wave when none active.
Null response behavior is explicit and safe.

tasks.objective: Stabilize discernment scoring/upsert and admin aggregation logic.
acceptance_criteria: Score calculations are accurate and bounded.
No NaN values in admin insights.
One response per user/wave remains enforced.

tasks.objective: Improve surveys UX feedback states, error handling, and accessibility clarity.
acceptance_criteria: Save success and error states are explicit.
Forms remain stable after save attempts.
Accessibility labels and interactions are clear.

tasks.objective: Verify public/dashboard navigation and branding consistency end-to-end.
acceptance_criteria: No broken route links.
Brand logo usage is consistent.
Public and protected entry flow is coherent.

tasks.objective: Align public API and orchestration documentation with current implemented behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Documented endpoints match implemented endpoints.
Route inventory generation is deterministic and complete.
No stale references to deprecated paths.

tasks.objective: Produce executable QA runbook covering vocal-request acceptance scenarios.
acceptance_criteria: Checklist covers consent, security, surveys, navigation.
Validation order is explicit and actionable.
Escalation/failure handling steps are documented.
